_note: Replace 'starter' paper with real AFCAT past papers. Format: one block per question separated by blank lines. Q: text, A)/B)/C)/D) options, ANS: A/B/C/D, EXP: explanation. The app also supports: (1) paste-paper flow saved to localStorage (paste once, used forever), (2) fetch from URL via CORS proxy (addPaperFromURL). See README at bottom of index.html.

papers.source: Starter practice set — replace with real AFCAT papers. Pattern: 25 Eng + 18 Math + 25 GA + 32 Reasoning = 100 Qs, 120 min.

questions.exp: Candid = frank, honest. From Latin candidus (white, pure).
Optimist expects good; pessimist expects bad.

questions.q: She ___ to the market every Sunday.
questions.exp: Present simple for habits; 3rd person singular takes -es.

opts: A misfortune that turns out well
questions.exp: Something that appears bad initially but results in good.

questions.q: Voice: 'The letter was written by her' — active form
questions.exp: Passive was/were + V3 → active: subject + V2 + object.

questions.q: If price increases by 20%, by what % must consumption decrease to keep expense same?
Simple interest on ₹5000 at 8% for 2 years
